patterns.comment: Index/file headers from `git diff`, `svn diff`, etc. — listed before the bare `-`/`+` patterns so they win.
patterns.name: meta.diff.index.header

patterns.comment: Mercurial / svn separator under an Index: line.
patterns.name: meta.diff.header

patterns.comment: Unified-diff hunk range (`@@ -l,c +l,c @@`). The trailing portion after the second `@@` is the optional function-context hint.
patterns.name: meta.diff.range.unified

patterns.comment: Inserted line — must come AFTER the `+++` rule so a file header isn't classified as an inserted line.
patterns.name: markup.inserted.diff

patterns.comment: Deleted line — must come AFTER the `---` rule for the same reason.
patterns.name: markup.deleted.diff

patterns.comment: Conflict markers — surface them in the same view so a pasted merge-conflict block is obvious.
patterns.name: markup.changed.diff
